w:r.w:t: Before the Motor Accident Claims Tribunal/District Judge at
In the court of the Principal Senior Civil Judge and MACT at Gubbi
s/o late Kempanna, Aged about 51 years;
Nataraju S.R., son of Rangaswamaiah, aged 38 years
(Owner of the Vehicle â€“ Swaraj Tractor bearing Reg.No.KA-06 TB-2023 and
Ramakrishna S.R. s/o Ranganath S.C., 42 years; R/o Mudigere, M.H. Patna post, Kasaba hobli, Gubbi taluk
do hereby apply for the grant of compensation for the Death sustained in motor vehicle
accident. Necessary particulars in respect of the death, injury, vehicle, etc. are given below
Name and Fatherâ€™s name of the
Full address of the person dead
Thejas gowda s/o Krishnamurthy, Singonahalli, Kasaba hobli,
Working at KMF, Gubbi. Cattle feed plant. And Agriculture
Name and address of the employer:
Monthly income of the person dead:
Does the person pay Income Tax?
Place, date and time of accident:
Between Singonahalli and Gubbi, in front of the house of Jayarammanna. Accident took place on 9-7-2025 at 7.40 pm.
Gubbi police Station. Cr. No. 265/2025 under Section 281, 106(1), 125 A of BNS 2023.
Was the person traveling by the vehicle?
Victim was travelling in his two wheeler â€“ Hero passion pro motor cycle bearing registration No. KA
Nature of injuries sustained and continuing effect, if any, of injuries.
Grievous injuries sustained in the accident and he was taken in a private vehicle to Gubbi Government Hospital.
Name and address of the Medical officer/practitioner if any, who attended on the dead or injured.
Death was declared by the Doctor at Manipal Hospital, Bengaluru Thereafter post mortem was conducted at Government Hospital, Gubbi.
Name of the injury and whether
it caused permanent disablement or not
Registration No. and the type of vehicle involved in the accident
Swaraj Tractor bearing Reg. No. KA-06 TB-2023 and Trailer
Name and address of the owner of the vehicle.
Respondent No.1 As per cause title.
Name, policy number, insurance particulars and address of the insurer of the
Has any claim been lodged with the owner /insurer if so with what result
Name and address of the applicants
As per cause title â€“ Claimants
Petitioner No.1 is the father Petitioner No.2 is mother Respondent No.3 is
Title to the property of the
Any other information that may be necessary or helpful in the disposal of claim:-

Singonahalli to Gubbi along with his friend (pillion Rider) by name Rajesh s/o Ramachandraiah. Said Thejas gowda was driving his father's vehicle Hero passion pro bearing Reg. No. KA 06 HB 3352. Rajesh was sitting in said vehicle as pillion rider. Both were going towards Gubbi in the evening. At about 7:30 pm, in front of Jayaramanna's

Swaraj Tractor and Trailer bearing bearing Reg.No.KA-06 TB-2023 and Trailer bearing Reg. No. KA 06 TB 2024 driven by its driver was moving in front of the Passion pro vehicle of Thejas gowda. The driver of the tractor all of a sudden taken diversion towards right side without any indication with rash and negligent driving. No radium sticker was affixed to trail body. Therefore the 1st petitioner's son- Thejas gowda dashed the Tractor trailer and fell down along with pillion rider along with their motor.
"Cycle. Due to impact/accident, Thejas gowda and pillion rider Rajesh were fell down on the road. Both were sustained grievous injuries. Rajesh Rajesh sustained injuries on

parts of the body. Then one Ranganatha S.R. s/o Rangaswami, who saw the accident, taken the both injured persons to Gubbi Government Hospital in a private vehicle. On the advise of the doctor, both were shifted to Siddartha Medical college hospital and from there shifted to District Hospital, Tumkur. Primary treatment was given in the District Hospital Tumkur and thereafter Thejas gowda was taken to Manipal Hospital, Bangalore for higher treatment. At about 1.30 AM on 10-7-2025, the Duty Doctor at Manipal hospital declared Thejas gowda as dead. Thereafter body was taken back to

Thereafter Pillion rider Rajesh who is the witness to the accident had given complaint to Gubbi police regarding the accident on 10-7-2025. It is submitted that the accident had occurred only due to rash and negligent driving driver of Driver of Swaraj Tractor bearing Reg.No.KA-06 TB-2023 and Trailer bearing Reg. No. KA 06 TB 2024. Then the Gubbi
It is submitted that the deceased Thejas gowda was hale and healthy and he was only

month and contributing the same for maintaining family - parents. The deceased was doing job at Cattle feed plant, KMF Gubbi and doing agriculture. Due to accident, his family members suffered agony and shock. The claimants suffered to the tune of Rs.2,00,000=00 for Ambulance charges, travelling charges, treatment charges and

That the respondent No.1 is the owner and respondent No.2 is the driver of the vehicle involved in the accident and NOT having valid insurance policy. Therefore the respondents are jointly and severally liable to pay the compensation amount to the claimants.
Wherefore it is respectfully prayed that this Honâ€™ble court may kindly be pleased to
damages, loss of future earnings, loss of dependency and other charges together with interest at the rate of 12% per annum from the date of petition till realization, with costs
We, all the claimants in the above case verified the pleadings and contents of the claim petition and what is stated above are true to the best of my knowledge, belief and information.
